events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Given only a single photo angle with the connector label, torque documentation, and clearance dimensions out of frame, I concluded `needs_more_info` (medium risk) rather than a pass/fail — NEC 250.104 (bonding sizing) and 250.30 (separately derived system bonding) both hinge on data not visible in the shot, so a compliance call can't be responsibly made until additional photos and the torque sheet are provided.
